goals: Discover what unit conversion categories are available
Convert temperature from Fahrenheit to Celsius to understand American weather forecasts
Convert weight from pounds to kilograms for health tracking
Convert digital storage from gigabytes to megabytes to understand file sizes

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and practical, adapting to American life while maintaining Japanese cultural values of thoroughness and precision.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Familiar with metric system from Japan, unfamiliar with American imperial units, does not know tool names or internal APIs.

end_condition: The user has successfully converted all needed measurements and understands the results.
